description: The touchscreen on the flight-sim kiosk in the main hangar is unresponsive in the lower-right quadrant. Visitors cannot complete the takeoff sequence. Reported by front desk this morning.
short_description: Flight-sim kiosk touchscreen unresponsive

description: The projector in the WWII gallery is showing a red color cast and flickers every few minutes during the looping documentary. Bulb hours may be exceeded.
short_description: WWII gallery projector flickering with red cast

description: The audio guide tablets in the docent room will not connect to the staff Wi-Fi network. Six of eight units affected, blocking the afternoon tour.
short_description: Audio guide tablets cannot join staff Wi-Fi

description: Front desk requests a new staff account and badge printer access for a seasonal visitor services volunteer starting next week.
short_description: New volunteer account and badge printer access

description: The point-of-sale terminal in the gift shop fails to print receipts after the latest software update. Card payments still process but no printed or emailed receipt is generated.
short_description: Gift shop POS not printing receipts after update

description: The motion-platform simulator in the experience gallery faults out after about two minutes of operation, showing a hydraulic-pressure warning. Taken offline pending inspection.
short_description: Motion-platform simulator faulting on hydraulic warning

description: The digital signage display at the front entrance is stuck on a loading screen and not pulling today's event schedule from the content server.
short_description: Entrance digital signage stuck on loading screen

description: The interactive cockpit exhibit's headphone jacks produce no audio on three of the four stations. Visitors report only static.
short_description: Cockpit exhibit headphone stations have no audio

description: The membership database export to the email marketing tool is failing nightly. Renewal reminders did not go out for the weekend batch. Reported by membership desk.
short_description: Membership export to email tool failing nightly

description: The donation kiosk card reader in the main lobby intermittently rejects taps and chip inserts. Several visitors unable to complete donations during the busy weekend.
short_description: Lobby donation kiosk card reader rejecting payments

description: Guest Wi-Fi in the cafe area drops every fifteen to twenty minutes. Visitors using the audio tour app on personal devices lose their place. Started after the weekend power outage.
short_description: Cafe guest Wi-Fi dropping every fifteen minutes

description: Docent volunteer requests a password reset for the audio guide content portal. Account locked after multiple failed attempts ahead of the morning tour.
short_description: Docent portal password reset request

description: The cockpit-procedures trainer in the education wing displays a startup error and will not load the 737 panel module. Scheduled school group cannot use the station.
short_description: Cockpit-procedures trainer fails to load 737 module

description: The online ticketing page shows an error at checkout for timed-entry passes. Visitors report card declines that do not actually charge. Affecting weekend advance sales.
short_description: Online ticketing checkout error on timed-entry passes

description: Two of the six gallery lighting zones in the jet-age exhibit will not power on from the control panel. Exhibit appears dim during open hours.
short_description: Jet-age exhibit lighting zones will not power on

description: The staff VPN used by the membership team for remote renewals will not authenticate. Two remote volunteers are unable to process this week's mail-in memberships.
short_description: Staff VPN authentication failing for membership team

description: The receipt printer at the membership desk jams on every transaction after a paper roll change. Staff hand-writing receipts as a workaround.
short_description: Membership desk receipt printer jamming after roll change

description: The volunteer scheduling app is not sending shift-confirmation emails. Several docents arrived for shifts that had been reassigned. Reported by visitor services lead.
short_description: Volunteer scheduling app not sending confirmation emails

description: The 360-degree theater projector loses sync between the three blended channels about halfway through each show, producing a visible seam. Reported by AV staff.
short_description: 360 theater projectors losing channel sync mid-show

description: Front desk requests an additional shared mailbox for the new traveling-exhibit coordinator and access to the events calendar. Routine onboarding request.
short_description: Shared mailbox and calendar access for exhibit coordinator
